meta.name: Octospark

connections.label: validates identity via JWT and OAuth sessions
ties subscriptions and invoices to organization
allocates and tops up credit balances on plan change
maintains per-org credit ledger and balances
resolves recipient identity for delivery routing
scopes notification preferences and channels to org
registers and scopes webhook endpoints per org
partitions asset catalog and R2 storage by org
creates asset records and stores files via R2 backend
reads assets and writes enrichment tags and alt-text
calls vision models for auto-tagging and transcription
deducts credits for each AI enrichment operation
deletes expired assets and reclaims R2 storage
reads plan tier to enforce retention policy limits
links social platform accounts to authenticated user
scopes connected social accounts to org workspace
uses OAuth tokens to publish posts to each platform
attaches media assets and variants to scheduled posts
triggers success/failure alerts after publish attempts
fires post.published and post.failed webhook events
uses valid OAuth tokens to fetch platform metrics
correlates engagement metrics with published posts
pre-allocates and deducts credits per LLM request
provides PromptConfig with selected variant to LLM
reads engagement metrics as reward signal for posteriors
invokes LLM content generation as workflow activity
schedules and publishes posts at end of campaign flow
uploads and attaches media assets during content creation
checks balance before AI calls and deducts on completion
requests optimal prompt variant before generation
sends workflow completion and failure alerts to users
authenticates every request via JWT middleware
resolves org context and enforces RBAC on all routes
exposes subscription, plan, and invoice management routes
exposes credit balance and transaction history routes
exposes notification feed, preferences, and mark-read routes
exposes webhook endpoint registration and delivery log routes
exposes asset CRUD, search, and presigned URL routes
exposes chunked upload initiation and progress routes
exposes enrichment trigger and tag review routes
exposes retention policy config and purge status routes
exposes OAuth connect, disconnect, and token refresh routes
exposes post scheduling, queue management, and publish routes
exposes engagement metrics, snapshots, and growth routes
exposes content generation and cost estimation routes
exposes variant management and recommendation routes
exposes workflow trigger, status, and run history routes
guides bulk social account connection during setup wizard
sends welcome emails and onboarding completion alerts
creates org, workspace, and initial team member records
